atomicity.message: The staged payload is one terminal land-21 docs and skill refresh: README/docs index/dogfooding findings/result-contract/skill docs/scaffold README template documentation. The added issue-draft and upstream-feedback docs are included because the staged docs index links them; no code, binaries, release assets, or beads state are staged.

conditions.message: The staged documentation/skill refresh has been checked with the applicable mechanical lint/test surfaces and the docs-specific grep checks from the packet.
evidence: Read backpressure/lint-rules.md; it requires applicable lint/style rules to be considered and distinguishes attestation review from executable burpvalve lint commands.
git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly the 14 paths in the packet, and git diff --cached --check exited 0.
go test ./... passed, including burpvalve/cmd/burpvalve, internal/attestations, internal/backpressure, internal/config, internal/ntm, and internal/scaffold.

The packet-required rg command over README.md docs skill/burpvalve plans/GOAL.md completed with expected historical/boundary hits for Dogfooding, Burpvalve product findings, beads_rust, project-readiness-kit, setup-command-project, v0.1.2, license/distribution, #13, and #14.
test -s docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md docs/burpvalve-issue-drafts-2026-07.md docs/upstream-br-feedback-2026-07.md passed.

conditions.message: The docs refresh reuses existing documentation surfaces and template pairs without duplicating contradictory guidance.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status/stat matched the packet's 14 staged docs/template/skill paths; 1831 insertions and 30 deletions.

git diff --cached showed attestation/failed-report formatter guidance added to both templates/backpressure/... and internal/scaffold/templates/backpressure/... paired template copies with matching wording.
README.md and skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md both route to existing JSON/recovery commands rather than inventing a second command model.

conditions.message: The staged docs do not claim false completion or deterministic enforcement; they label drafts/local-only material and preserve verifier evidence requirements.
evidence: docs/burpvalve-issue-drafts-2026-07.md starts with 'Local draft only. Do not file these issues before v0.1.2 lands.'
docs/upstream-br-feedback-2026-07.md says filing issues on Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust is outward-facing and waits for owner approval.
README.md and skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md document independent_required verifier policy and say not to fabricate subagent/verifier confirmation.
templates/backpressure/attestations/README.md and templates/log/backpressure/failed/README.md warn not to hand-edit generated evidence and to exclude generated JSON from broad formatters instead.

conditions.message: No governed one-function-one-test surface exists in this staged payload: it changes Markdown docs, skill instructions, and Markdown scaffold templates, not executable functions or behavior requiring a new nearby behavioral test.
evidence: Read backpressure/one-function-one-test.md; it governs new or changed behavior requiring direct test coverage, not literal one-test-per-helper bookkeeping.
git diff --cached --name-status lists README.md, docs/*.md, skill/burpvalve/*.md, plans/GOAL.md, and Markdown scaffold/template README files only.
No Go source files or test files are staged in this land-21 payload; go test ./... still passed as a regression check.

conditions.message: The staged docs slice has passing whitespace/test evidence and the feature-specific CI probe identifies the intended payload hash, blocking only because the attestation is not yet staged.
evidence: git diff --cached --check exited 0 on the staged payload.
go test ./... passed in /tmp/land21-stage.qcArvD across cmd/burpvalve and all internal packages.

go run ./cmd/burpvalve ci --feature project-readiness-kit-land-21-docs-skill-refresh-jcm reported staged_payload_hash sha256:dee0e0e163adcfb10fa8adb760542277372225c4916b9ae5886dc86d74bd7b7a and blocked only on missing attestation artifact backpressure/attestations/dee0e0e163adcfb10fa8adb760542277372225c4916b9ae5886dc86d74bd7b7a.json.

conditions.message: The staged payload records durable evidence and links the new evidence docs from the docs index.
evidence: test -s docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md passed in the staged snapshot.

docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md records sources as Agent Mail reports, RusticDog observations, and the 2026-07 plan review round, with Burpvalve product findings and upstream br/bv findings sections.

docs/README.md links docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md, docs/burpvalve-issue-drafts-2026-07.md, docs/upstream-br-feedback-2026-07.md, and docs/result-contract.md; a file-existence probe found those links present in the staged snapshot.

conditions.message: The payload is scoped to the land-21 docs/skill refresh plus linked draft documents needed by the staged docs index.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly the 14 packet paths and no excluded staged payload paths in the ci plan.
go run ./cmd/burpvalve ci --feature project-readiness-kit-land-21-docs-skill-refresh-jcm listed the same 14 staged_payload_paths and no excluded_staged_paths.

git diff --cached -- docs/matt-pocock-skill-patterns.md docs/setup-pre-commit-patterns.md templates/log/README.md internal/scaffold/templates/log/README.md produced no output, matching the packet's no-staged-diff note.

docs/README.md newly links the added docs/burpvalve-issue-drafts-2026-07.md, docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md, docs/upstream-br-feedback-2026-07.md, and modified docs/result-contract.md, explaining why those files are in scope.

conditions.message: Governed installer/config/beads docs preserve explicit confirmation and read-only boundaries for risky operations.
evidence: README.md and skill/burpvalve/INSTALL.md state the installer prints a plan, names replacements, asks for final confirmation by default, defaults No, and says --yes is only for already intended locations.
README.md documents beads preflight as read-only and says it does not close beads, run br sync, stage files, commit files, or write attestations.

skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md documents config init as mutating only after guided confirmation, --force, or robot confirmation, and says verifier prompts are read-only and do not spawn/send/claim verification.

conditions.message: The docs protect evidence artifact integrity and clarify JSON result semantics without changing persisted data code.
evidence: docs/result-contract.md defines shared status/fatal/partial_success/next_steps fields and distinguishes scaffold-only lint from command-output enforcement.

templates/backpressure/attestations/README.md and internal/scaffold/templates/backpressure/attestations/README.md say passing attestations are generated, indented JSON with a trailing newline and should not be hand-edited for formatters.

templates/log/backpressure/failed/README.md and internal/scaffold/templates/log/backpressure/failed/README.md give the same generated JSON guidance for blocked reports and reiterate blocked reports are not passing commit attestations.
go test ./... passed in the staged snapshot, covering unchanged runtime artifact/query behavior while docs/templates were refreshed.

conditions.message: Security-governed documentation was inspected: private/proprietary distribution, authenticated private release installs, PATH/shim behavior, and verifier policy boundaries remain explicit and do not introduce secrets or permission bypasses.
evidence: skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md metadata remains license: proprietary and distribution: forbidden, and README.md states the repository is private and marked proprietary in packaged skill metadata.
skill/burpvalve/INSTALL.md and README.md describe authenticated gh release download for private releases without embedding any token or secret value.

rg over staged docs/skill/template paths found security-boundary wording around PATH, private installs, verifier.kind policy, and permissions, but no staged auth-token/secret/password/API-key material.
README.md documents security-boundaries as prompt-level by default and says stronger security pressure requires structural checks, scanner fixtures, secret scanners, and permission design.

conditions.message: No governed visual-regression surface exists in this staged payload: there are no browser, screenshot, canvas, responsive layout, image, SVG, GIF, or rendered UI asset changes.
evidence: Read backpressure/visual-regression.md; it governs screenshot, browser, responsive layout, canvas, and visual-diff work.
Staged path list contains only Markdown documentation/skill/template files.

Targeted staged diff grep for screenshot/browser/canvas/CSS/responsive/image/SVG/GIF/TUI/layout found only prose references such as the read-only terminal browser command and no changed rendered visual asset or UI layout surface.

conditions.message: No governed performance-budget surface exists in this staged payload: it does not change runtime code, benchmarks, bundle output, memory/latency-sensitive logic, or executable budget enforcement.
evidence: Read backpressure/performance-budget.md; it governs latency, memory, token, cost, bundle-size, throughput, and benchmark thresholds.
Staged path list is documentation/skill/template Markdown only, with no executable code or benchmark files staged.

Targeted staged diff grep for performance-related terms found only prose/history references such as the original binary-size budget in plans/GOAL.md and orchestration latency notes in findings, not a changed performance surface.

conditions.message: The refreshed docs keep agent autonomy bounded by read-only recovery surfaces, explicit mutation confirmation, owner approval for outward-facing drafts, and independent verifier evidence rules.
evidence: docs/burpvalve-issue-drafts-2026-07.md says not to file issues before v0.1.2 lands unless rel issue-hygiene work or a direct owner instruction authorizes it; docs/upstream-br-feedback-2026-07.md says upstream filing waits for owner approval.
README.md documents explain and attestations browse as read-only and states browse does not close beads, stage files, delete artifacts, repair files, or run commit gates.

skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md says verifier prompts are read-only and do not spawn native subagents, send NTM tasks, or claim verification happened; it also requires verifier.kind main_agent/ci/human only when manifest policy allows it.
